Quick Start Guide

Get up to speed with HeyZack documentation in 5 minutes

Quick Start Guide

Get up to speed with HeyZack brand and marketing documentation in 5 minutes.

Who Is This Wiki For?

RoleStart HereKey Resources
Marketing ManagerProduct OverviewVoice Guide, Ad Creative, Email Templates
Content CreatorVoice & ToneSocial Content, Engagement Playbook
Sales (B2B)B2B PersonasCampaign Copy, Features
Community ManagerCommunity ManagementEngagement Playbook, Influencer Outreach
Agency PartnerBrand PositioningFull documentation review

The 5-Minute Overview

1. What Is HeyZack? (1 min)

AI-powered smart home and building automation with 128 products across 15 categories. Dual market: 50% B2C (homeowners), 50% B2B (commercial buildings).

Brand Promise: “AI Automation for Residential & Commercial Buildings”

2. Who Are We Talking To? (2 min)

B2C Audiences:

  • Tech-Savvy Homeowners — Early adopters wanting intelligent automation
  • Energy-Conscious Consumers — Cost and sustainability focused
  • Safety-Focused Families — Security and peace of mind

B2B Audiences:

  • Property Managers — Multi-property portfolio efficiency
  • Hospitality Operators — Guest experience differentiation

3. How Do We Sound? (1 min)

AttributeWe AreWe Are Not
ToneFriendly, confident, helpfulRobotic, pushy, overly casual
LanguagePlain English, benefit-focusedTechnical jargon, feature-dumping
VoiceKnowledgeable guideSalesperson or tech manual

See Voice & Tone Guide for examples.

4. What Assets Are Available? (1 min)

Asset TypeLocationCount
Ad Copy (B2B + B2C)Ad Creative78 ads
Email SequencesEmail Templates11 emails
Landing Page CopyCampaign Copy2 pages
Social PostsSocial Content30 days
Engagement ScriptsEngagement Playbook15+ templates

Common Tasks

”I need to write ad copy”

  1. Check target audience in Personas
  2. Review tone in Voice Guide
  3. Reference existing ads in Ad Creative

”I need to respond to a review”

→ Go directly to Engagement Playbook

”I need product specs for a pitch”

→ Specifications has all 128 products with pricing

”I need to brief an influencer”

→ Influencer Outreach has DM and email templates

Next Steps

  • Deep dive into product: Features
  • Understand competitive positioning: Brand Positioning
  • Plan content: 30-Day Social Calendar
